description:
# Seared Scallop Dish

This elegantly plated fine dining dish features perfectly seared scallops with a golden crust, served atop a vibrant green pea purée and accompanied by a delicate cream sauce. The presentation is refined and sophisticated, garnished with fresh rosemary sprigs, chive greens, and edible purple flowers on a soft blue-green plate, evoking an upscale restaurant atmosphere.

# Gourmet Salmon Dish

This appetizing image showcases perfectly seared salmon fillets with a golden-brown crust, artfully plated on a dark slate surface and garnished with fresh herbs like rosemary and basil, creating an elegant fine dining presentation. The warm, professional lighting and carefully arranged accompaniments evoke a refined, upscale culinary atmosphere.
